title: Revise Feedback Loop Excalidraw into Data Flywheel master diagram
description: Update documentation/diagrams/Feedback Loop.excalidraw to a single mixed eng/ops data flywheel with stage artifacts, two decision gates, and consistent visual language.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Decision log: Using Data Flywheel Operations terminology; preserving one-diagram deliverable; maintaining current diagram typography style while normalizing layout and color semantics (process, artifact, decision).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Scope: Update documentation/diagrams/Feedback Loop.excalidraw into a single mixed eng/ops Data Flywheel master diagram. Include six stages, stage artifact callouts, and two explicit decision gates (quality threshold and promote/deploy).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementation complete: rewrote Feedback Loop.excalidraw as a six-stage clockwise data flywheel with stage artifacts, two decision gates (quality threshold + promote/deploy), explicit Yes/No paths, and consistent process/artifact/decision color semantics.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Validation: jq JSON parse passes; diagram now contains 6 process rectangles, 2 decision diamonds, 10 bound arrows, and stage artifact callouts. File changed: documentation/diagrams/Feedback Loop.excalidraw.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Follow-up fix for load failure: removed custom "index" fields from all elements in Feedback Loop.excalidraw. Root cause is likely invalid element ordering indices (non-fractional tokens like stage_guidelines), which can break Excalidraw scene restore.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Post-fix validation: jq parse passes, no "index" keys remain, arrow bindings still valid. Pending user re-open check in UI.
